## How was it tested?

<!-- Unit tests, e2e tests, manual steps, browsers checked. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm run format:check`, `npm test` pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass locally (`npm run test:e2e`) or new flows are covered
- [ ] Keyboard-accessible and screen-reader friendly (see accessibility checklist)
- [ ] No new network requests, telemetry or tracking of any kind
- [ ] Notes remain portable — no proprietary syntax written into user files
- [ ] New dependencies (if any) are small, justified and AGPL-compatible
- [ ] SPDX headers on new source files; docs updated if behaviour changed
